subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! Thou seest me turning in supplication toward the heaven of Thy merciful bounty, and imploring in lowliness the exalted realm of Thy Lordship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ترانی مبتهلا الی سماء بهاء رحمانیتک و متضرعا الی علاء مقام ربوبیتک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for teaching, @prayer for nearness to God
